flavor: "It's time for The Flowering. When all illusions... Fall away."
name: Quoi
text: [star] Forced Interrupt: When Quoi initiates an attack against you, place 1 vine counter on the Deadly Vines attached to you.

name: Organic Portal
text: Hinder 2[per_hero] When Defeated: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until you discard a minion. Put that minion into play engaged with the first player. [hazard] [star] Boost: Put this card into play.

flavor: "I come not to bring peace -- but the sword of my vengeance upon you!"
name: Quoi
text:
When Revealed: Deal 1 encounter card to each player.
[star] Forced Interrupt: When Quoi initiates an activation against you, place 1 vine counter on the Deadly Vines attached to you.

flavor: "Let all the animal words fall -- and the Cotati rise anew! Masters of the Cosmos!"
name: Quoi
text: When Revealed: Put Swordsman into play engaged with the first player. Forced Interrupt: When Quoi initiates an activation against you, place 1 vine counter on the Deadly Vines attached to you.

name: Blue Area of the Moon
text: Contents: Quoi (I) and Quoi (II). (Quoi (II) and Quoi (III) instead for expert mode.) Celestial Messiah and Standard encounter sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: Cotati Infection). Setup: Attach a Deadly Vines to each identity and set the remaining aside. Set Swordsman aside, out of play.

flavor: The Death Blossom has bloomed on the Moon. The Cotati now prepare to invade Wakanda and plant a stronger Death Blossom there.
name: Blue Area of the Moon
text: When Completed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Cotati Empyre side scheme and reveal it.

flavor: The Cotati have reached Wakanda and intend to take over its Vibranium enriched soils to plant their most powerful Death Blossom yet.
name: Battle for Wakanda
text: When Revealed: Place 2 vine counters on each Deadly Vines attachment.

flavor: A war has ensued for control of Wakanda. Stop Quoi before the Death Blossom blooms or he'll have enough power to rule the galaxy.
name: Battle for Wakanda
text: You must spend an additional resource to perform the "Action" on Deadly Vines. If this scheme is completed, the players lose the game.

flavor:
"The Cotati -- They've weaponized every scrap of plant life in the planet!"
- Captain Glory
name: Deadly Vines
text: Permanent. Forced Interrupt: At the end of the player phase, take 1 indirect damage per vine counter here. Action: Spend 1 resource of any type → remove all vine counters here.

name: Swordsman
text: Retaliate 2. When Revealed: Swordsman activates against the engaged player. When Defeated: Deal 2[per_hero] damage to Quoi. Remove Swordsman from the game.

name: Quoi's Golden Sword
text: Attach to Quoi. [star] Quoi's attacks gain piercing. If another Quoi's Golden Sword attachment is attached to Quoi, his attacks also gain overkill. Hero Response: After Quoi attacks you, spend a [physical] resource and place 1 vine counter on the Deadly Vines attached to you → discard this card.

name: Wooden Shackles
text: Attach to your identity. Forced Interrupt: When you would draw any amount of cards, draw 1 less card. Forced Interrupt: When the villain phase begins, discard this card. You are stunned. [star] Boost: Discard a card from your hand.

name: Cotati Warrior
text: Quickstrike. When Defeated: Deal 1 damage to the player who defeated this minion. [star] Boost: Place 1 vine counter on the Deadly Vines attached to you.

name: Excruciating Release
text: When Revealed: Take 2 indirect damage and remove each vine counter from the Deadly Vines attached to you. For each vine counter removed this way, you take 1 additional damage. [star]Boost: Place 1 threat on the main scheme. Remove 1 vine counter from the Deadly Vines attached to you.

flavor: "Watch us rise... In all our splendor!" - Quoi
name: Growth Spurt
text: When Revealed: Place 1 vine counter on the Deadly Vines attached to you. Then, place 1 threat on the main scheme for each vine counter on that Deadly Vines. If 2 or less threat was placed this way, this card gains surge.

flavor: "I have conquered this planet! I have brought my heaven to your bestial Earth." - Quoi
name: Seize Control
text: When Revealed: Quoi activates against you. He gets +X ATK and +X SCH for this activation, where X is equal to the number of vine counters on the Deadly Vines attached to you. Do not give the villain a boost card for this activation.

flavor: Quoi has begun The Flowering. He now seeks dominion over the cosmos.
name: Cotati Empyre
text: Each [[COTATI]] enemy gets +1 ATK and +1 SCH.

flavor: The Cotati are destroying everything that resembles animal life. They intend for this world, and every other world, to be painted green.
name: Green Domain
text: When Revealed: Place 1 threat here for each vine counter on each Deadly Vines attachment. [crisis]

name: Body Takeover
text: Treat attached ally as a [[Cotati]] minion with a blank text box. Attached minion's SCH is equal to its printed THW and it does not take consequential damage. When Revealed: Attach to the ally with the highest remaining hit points without Body Takeover attached and heal all damage from it. Attached ally engages its controller. Otherwise, this card gains surge.

name: Cotati Wizard
text: When Revealed: Discard the top 2 cards of the encounter deck. Reveal the first minion discarded this way. [star] Boost: Resolve this minion's "When Revealed" ability.

name: She-hulk
text: Toughness. [star] She-Hulk's attacks gain overkill. [star] Boost: If this activation is an attack, this attack gains overkill.
